pi_items.source: task.json description, setup_task.sh deletion query, and verifier.py DASHBOARD_NAME constant explicitly define and check this name.
export_result.sh output script and verifier.py RESULT_PATH constant.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes real-world server metrics from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset (e.g., actual AWS CloudWatch RDS CPU utilization and real web traffic speeds). The expected dashboard name is confirmed to be 'Post-Incident Blast Radius' based on the task description and verifier.py logic. The expected result file path is also verified.
